title: Pykara
tagline: Pykara — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Pykara is a river 19 kilometres (12 mi) from Ooty in the Indian State of Tamil Nadu with a village by the same name nearby.
overview.description: The Pykara is a river 19 kilometres (12 mi) from Ooty in the Indian State of Tamil Nadu with a village by the same name nearby. The Pykara River is considered very sacred by the Todas. It rises at Mukurthi peak, flows northwards, and then turns to the west after reaching the edge of the plateau. The river flows through Mukurthi, Pykara and Glenmorgan dams, and forms part of an important hydro-electric power project.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Naduvattam, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Naduvattam is a Panchayat town in The Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on Coimbatore-Gundalpet National Highway NH 67 of the Nilgiri Ghat Roads.

topPlaces.name: Glenmorgan, Nilgiris
topPlaces.description: Glenmorgan is a village located at a distance of 25 kilometers from Ooty. This place is known for its tea estates which includes one of the oldest tea estates in the region known as the Glenmorgan tea estate.

topPlaces.name: Kamaraj Sagar Dam
topPlaces.description: The Kamaraj Sagar Dam (also known as Sandynalla reservoir) is in the Nilgiris district of Tamil Nadu state in India. It is located at a distance of 10 km from the Ooty bus stand.

topPlaces.name: Sholur
topPlaces.description: Sholur is a panchayat town in The Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Ooty Golf Course
topPlaces.description: Ooty Golf Course is located in the town of Ooty in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The golf course is set at an altitude of 2194 metres.

topPlaces.name: Kalhatti Falls (Ooty)
topPlaces.description: Kalhatti Falls also called as Bird Watcher's Falls is a tourist spot near Ooty, The Nilgiris, Tamil Nadu. These falls are about 13 km (8.1 mi) from Ooty, on the Ooty to Mysore Road or Sigur Ghat Road, It is situated at an elevation of about 1,600 m (5,200 ft) in the Sigur Plateau.

topPlaces.name: Frog Hill View Point
topPlaces.description: Frog Hill View Point (also Valley View Point) is a tourist spot above Gudalur, Nilgiris district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is about 12 km (7.5 mi) from Gudalur on NH 181 from Ooty to Gudalur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pykara?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pykara is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (68 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (65 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pykara?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pykara at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pykara?
faq.a: Stays in Pykara start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pykara?
faq.a: The top attractions are Naduvattam, Tamil Nadu, Glenmorgan, Nilgiris, Kamaraj Sagar Dam, Sholur, Ooty Golf Course.
